title: When to Ask for Help
drDigitalIntro:
Some problems need a professional or a search.
• If you see an error code, copy it and search for it — that's often the fastest fix.
• Get help for strange sounds, a stuck screen, or a suspected virus.
• Also if you've tried the basics (force quit, restart, check WiFi) and nothing works.
• Tip: paste the error message into a search engine or support page to find solutions.

playgroundTask.goal: You found help for an error by copying the error code
playgroundTask.scenario: Photos shows an error with code PX-4402

steps.say: Photos crashed with an error. Click Copy to save the error code.
Good — you copied PX-4402. Now click OK to close this dialog.
Open Browser in the dock to search for help.
Click Paste to put the error code into the support page.
Click Submit to search for a solution.
The solution says to reopen Photos. Click Photos in the dock.

drDigitalSuccess: You found help by copying the error code and searching for it! That's a real skill — tech support and search engines both work best when you give them the exact error.
drDigitalHint: Copy the error code, open the browser, paste it into the support page, and submit.
